title: Betrayal (disambiguation)
content:
'''Betrayal''' may refer to:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Battle of Renatasia]]''', also known as "'''the Betrayal'''"
*'''[[Blade of the Betrayer]]''', a [[Sword/Legends|blade]] owned by [[Vansk]]
*'''[[New Sith Wars]]''', also known as "'''The Betrayal'''"
*"'''[[Obeisance: Betrayal Within]]'''," a [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] documentary produced by [[Armennion Ullgusta]]

==Real world==
===Canon media===
*"'''[[Betrayal at Bespin]]'''," a short story by [[Michael Siglain]] that appeared in ''[[The Original Trilogy Stories]]''

===Legends media===
*"'''[[Betrayal is Just The Beginning]]'''," an article by [[Jason Fry]] that appeared in [[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]]
*'''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II#Betrayal (cinematic trailer)|''Betrayal'']]''', the second cinematic trailer developed for the ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]]
*'''''[[Betrayal!]]''''', a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] originally published in [[Star Wars Weekly 114|''Star Wars Weekly'' 114]]
*'''[[Star Wars (1977) 43|''Betrayal at Bespin!'']]''', the forty-third issue in the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] comic series
*'''''[[Betrayal by Knight]]''''', a short story by [[Patricia A. Jackson]] and [[Charlene Newcomb]] that appeared in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 12|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 12]]
*'''''[[Betrayed]]''''', the fifth cinematic trailer developed for the ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' video game
*'''''[[Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal]]''''', the fourth and final issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt: The Art of the Deal]]'' comic series
*'''''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''''', the first volume in the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' novel series
**'''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Betrayal'']]''', the audiobook
*'''''[[Star Wars: Empire: Betrayal]]''''', the first story arc in the ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'' comic series
**'''''[[Star Wars: Empire Volume 1: Betrayal]]''''', the trade paperback
***"'''[[Empire 1|Betrayal, Part 1]]'''," the first issue in the ''Star Wars: Empire'' comic series
***"'''[[Empire 2|Betrayal, Part 2]]'''," the second issue in the ''Star Wars: Empire'' comic series
***"'''[[Empire 3|Betrayal, Part 3]]'''," the third issue in the ''Star Wars: Empire'' comic series
***"'''[[Empire 4|Betrayal, Part 4]]'''," the fourth issue in the ''Star Wars: Empire'' comic series
*"'''[[The Art of Betrayal]]'''," a [[roleplaying game]] adventure by [[Brian J. Murphy]] that appeared in ''[[The Politics of Contraband]]''
*'''''[[The Betrayal of Darth Revan]]''''', a roleplaying game adventure by [[Patrick Stutzman]] for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook]]''

===Music===
*"'''[[Anakin's Betrayal]]'''," a piece written by [[John Williams]] for the [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (soundtrack)|soundtrack]] of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]

==See also==
*[[The Betrayal (disambiguation)|The Betrayal]]
